% Research Interests
\section*{RESEARCH INTERESTS}
My research interests lie in reconfigurable computing, computer architecture, and digital hardware design. I am particularly interested in the translation of architectural models into synthesisable hardware: spanning RTL design, hierarchical system decomposition, FPGA implementation, and hardware verification. More broadly, I am drawn to research that bridges theoretical computing models with practical, resource-constrained hardware realisation on programmable logic platforms.

% Education
\section*{EDUCATION}

\experienceheader{University of Indonesia (UI)}{Jakarta, Indonesia}{Bachelor of Computer Science, Information Systems}{Expected Graduation: Aug 2026}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item \textbf{GPA: 3.84/4.00}
    \item \textbf{Thesis Advisor:} Prof. Petrus Mursanto (Full Professor, former Dean of Faculty of Computer Science)
    \item \textbf{Thesis:} Implementation of Morris Mano Computer Architecture with Enhanced Jump Branching Capabilities on Xilinx Spartan-3AN FPGA Platform (XC3S700AN) using VHDL
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=0.5pt, topsep=0.5pt]
        \item Extended baseline architecture by implementing jump branching in datapath for complex control flow operations
        \item Designed and optimized digital logic circuits for hardware-level branching mechanisms
        \item Investigated hardware resource utilization and timing constraints for branching logic optimization
        \item Synthesized and tested on physical FPGA hardware (not just simulation), validating functional correctness and performance
        \item Mainly based on M. Morris Mano's Computer System Architecture
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Relevant Coursework:} Computer Architecture, Operating Systems, Data Structures \& Algorithms, Introduction to AI \& Data Science, Statistics \& Probability, Data Communication Networks, Database Systems
\end{itemize}
\experienceheader{Nanyang Technological University (NTU) \& ITS}{Singapore \& Surabaya}{INSPIRASI–NTU Summer Program 2025 (LPDP Scholarship Awardee)}{July 2025}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item Conducted research on smart port automation, IoT sensor networks, and energy-efficient deployments in distributed maritime systems
    \item Produced technical report proposing tiered port automation framework with renewable energy utilization and carbon emission reduction
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Systems Programming:} C, Python, Java, VHDL (hardware description), Go \\

\textbf{Machine Learning:} Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, imbalanced learning \\
